commands.command: current work-item inventory plus research gap, conformance, CI, adopter, and benchmark inspection
commands.summary: Mapped each observed blind spot to an existing or new durable work item; WI-022 was strengthened for statistical and RealRunner gates, and uncovered obligations received WI-029 through WI-034.
The canonical dashboard reports eight active items and one blocked item, and repository governance validation passes.
All 8 existing conformance cases pass; expanding their rule coverage is explicitly owned by WI-030.
All 101 tests pass with the two documented open-model obligations skipped.
